scaled_oracle_cases.description: Test that deblur_system_call correctly handles non-string params (integers) and pathlib.Path input_fp by converting all items to strings.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that the function correctly converts non-string inputs to strings in the command list.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: All elements in the command list must be strings, regardless of input types.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Without conversion, integer items cause TypeError or produce command list with integers.
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)
from pathlib import Path
input_fp = Path('test_sequences.fasta')
with open(input_fp, 'w') as f:
    f.write('>seq1\nACTG\n>seq2\nTGCA\n')
params = [10, '--min-size', 50]
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
stdout, stderr, returncode = deblur_system_call(params, input_fp)
print('STDOUT:', stdout)
print('STDERR:', stderr)
print('Return code:', returncode)
result = {'stdout': stdout, 'stderr': stderr, 'returncode': returncode}
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include at least one test with non-string params (e.g., integers) and a pathlib.Path input_fp. The test must check that the returned stdout contains the command list with all string representations.
